backend/DirectionType.mo: Defines a simple Motoko module exporting a `DirectionType` variant with `#up` and `#down` values.
backend/main.mo: Main actor implementing market data storage, user profile management, HTTP outcalls, and access-controlled CRUD operations for a crypto market assistant on ICP.
backend/MarketData.mo: Defines the `MarketData` type with symbol, price, volume, and direction fields, importing `DirectionType`.
backend/Theme.mo: Defines a `Theme` variant type with `#darkNeon` and `#cyberGlow` options.
backend/UserPreferences.mo: Defines `UserPreferences` and `UserPreferencesInput` types for storing user theme, favourites, alerts, and language settings.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature IDs (tab removals: ICP Analysis, Radar, Order Book, Trade Monitor) to affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Empty CSS file serving as the frontend entry-point stylesheet.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with comprehensive PWA meta tags, iOS splash screens, multi-size icons, and manifest link for the Crypto Market Assistant app.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest defining app metadata, icons, display mode, and shortcuts for Mercado, Recomendações, AI Paper Trading, and Pesquisa tabs.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker (v9) that caches static assets on install, cleans old caches on activate, and handles fetch events with a cache-first strategy for a crypto market PWA.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up React Query, theme, and a tabbed navigation layout with lazy-loaded page components (Market, Recommendations, AI Paper Trading, Research, Institutional, Preferences).
frontend/src/components/AIPaperTrading.t: Page component for the AI Paper Trading tab, displaying open simulated positions filtered by trading modality, a stats panel, and a link to trade history.
frontend/src/components/AIPaperTradingSt: Stats panel component showing aggregated AI paper trading accuracy metrics (win rate, PnL, modality breakdown) with a reset/clear history action.
frontend/src/components/AIPerformancePan: Panel component that displays AI learning engine stats (accuracy, learning level, predictions) for a specific asset or a ranked list of all assets.
frontend/src/components/AppErrorBoundary: React class-based error boundary that catches unhandled errors, displays a user-friendly error card, and offers a reload action that clears service worker caches first.
frontend/src/components/AssetResearch.ts: A React component that allows users to search and select Binance Futures USD-M assets, displaying market data and a predictive confidence panel for the selected symbol.
frontend/src/components/DataStatusIndica: A fixed overlay alert component that displays live data fetch status, staleness warnings, and error messages (including blocked/restricted access) with a retry button.
frontend/src/components/DynamicAlerts.ts: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A simple footer component displaying a copyright notice with a heart icon and a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: A sticky header component showing the app title and a conditional PWA install button that opens a PWAInstallDialog.
frontend/src/components/ICPAnalysis.tsx: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/components/InstallPrompt.ts: A proactive PWA install prompt card that appears after 3 seconds if the app is installable and not yet dismissed, opening a PWAInstallDialog on confirmation.
frontend/src/components/InstitutionalOrd: A component that fetches and displays BTC institutional buy/sell signals for both Binance Futures USD-M and Spot markets, with error categorization and a manual refresh button.
frontend/src/components/MarketCard.tsx: A clickable card component that displays a single Binance Futures market's price, 24h change percentage, volume, and analysis strength with bullish/bearish neon styling.
frontend/src/components/MarketOverview.t: Displays a live market overview using Binance Futures data, rendering a grid of MarketCard components with a selectable symbol that shows detailed analysis panels including predictive confidence and AI performance.
frontend/src/components/Opportunities.ts: Renders trading opportunities grouped by modality (scalping, swing, breakout, etc.) in a tabbed layout, with clickable cards that open an OpportunityDetailsPanel slide-over for detailed trade setup info.
frontend/src/components/OpportunityDetai: A fixed right-side slide-over panel showing detailed trade setup for a selected symbol and modality, including current price, price change badge, and a trade recommendation loaded via useTradeRecommendation hook.
frontend/src/components/PaperTradeCard.t: Renders a single paper trade card showing entry price, direction, modality, PnL, and take-profit target hit status with expandable reference details.
frontend/src/components/PaperTradeHistor: Displays a paginated, filterable list of closed paper trades with modality and direction filters, using the usePaperTradeHistory hook.
frontend/src/components/PredictiveConfid: Shows a visual confidence meter (progress bar and badge) for a technical analysis prediction, with color-coded styling based on high/medium/low confidence levels.
frontend/src/components/PWADiagnosticsVi: Displays PWA technical diagnostics including display mode, install prompt status, and asset check results using the usePWADiagnostics hook, with status icons and a refresh button.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallDialog: A dialog component that guides users through PWA installation, showing iOS Safari step-by-step instructions or a one-click install button for other platforms via the usePWAInstall hook.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallStatus: Displays the current PWA installation status (installed, installable, or not supported) with platform-specific install instructions and a prompt button using the usePWAInstall hook.
frontend/src/components/ResetFromScratch: An alert dialog that confirms and executes a full app reset, clearing AI history, user preferences, and caches, then reloads the app.
frontend/src/components/TabFetchErrorSta: Renders a centered error card for tab data-fetch failures, with error details, a PWA cache mismatch hint, and a reload button.
frontend/src/components/TabPageCard.tsx: A reusable card layout component for tab pages, accepting an icon, title, description, optional badge, and children content.
frontend/src/components/ThemeProvider.ts: Provides a React context for managing two app themes ('darkNeon' and 'cyberGlow'), persisting the selection to localStorage and applying the corresponding CSS class to the document root.
frontend/src/components/TopRecommendatio: Displays a ranked list of up to 10 top trading recommendations by combining live Binance market data with algorithmic recommendation scores, including loading skeletons and error states.
frontend/src/components/TradeInputForm.t: Renders a trade entry form with symbol autocomplete (from Binance market data), leverage slider, long/short direction toggle, and entry price input, validating inputs before calling the onSubmit callback.
Settings panel allowing users to switch visual themes, toggle alerts, manage favourite assets, and configure AI learning prioritization, with all preferences persisted to localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/queries/analysisEnric: Computes advanced technical analysis for a Binance ticker including trend, strength, Fibonacci support/resistance zones, manipulation zone detection, institutional order detection, and learning-engine-optimized confidence scores.
Browser-based module for fetching Binance Futures USD-M ticker data (all symbols or a single symbol) with structured error classification into network, blocked, rate-limit, server, and unknown categories.
frontend/src/hooks/queries/binanceFuture: Provides browser-based fetching of Binance USD-M Futures funding rates and open interest, with partial-failure handling and in-memory session history for detecting metric changes.
frontend/src/hooks/queries/institutional: Detects institutional trading signals from BTC market data using volume and price action heuristics, exposing React Query hooks for both Futures and Spot markets with backend fallback.
frontend/src/hooks/queries/learningInteg: Integrates the learning engine by recording new market predictions and updating past predictions with actual prices, with optional prioritization of favourite symbols.
Generates a sorted list of top bullish trading recommendations from market data based on trend, confidence, strength, and learning level.
frontend/src/hooks/queries/opportunityRu: Defines scoring and filtering rules to select top trading opportunities for scalping and swing strategies from market data, returning deterministically sorted results.
frontend/src/hooks/queries/unifiedSnapsh: Transforms a backend UnifiedSnapshot into frontend BinanceMarketData format, including safe number conversion and technical analysis enrichment.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) actors, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAIPaperTrades.ts: React Query hook that fetches and optionally filters open AI paper trades by modality, refreshing every 5 seconds, plus a helper to invalidate related queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useAIPaperTradingEngi: React hook that starts the AI paper trading engine as a singleton on mount, ensuring only one engine instance runs across all hook usages.
frontend/src/hooks/useBinanceFuturesSymb: React Query hook that fetches active USDT-margined perpetual futures symbols from Binance's exchange info API, falling back to a static list on failure.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing login/logout state via DFINITY's AuthClient and exposing identity, status flags, and login/clear functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useOpportunities.ts: React Query hook that derives grouped trading opportunities (scalping, swing, breakout, reversal, SMC, FVG) from live Binance market data using modality-specific selection rules.
React Query hook that fetches closed paper trades and their summary from local storage, with periodic refetching and a mutation to clear all history.
frontend/src/hooks/usePWADiagnostics.ts: Hook that runs PWA health checks on mount, reporting display mode, service worker state, manifest fetch status, and critical icon availability, along with a list of detected issues.
frontend/src/hooks/usePWAInstall.ts: Hook that manages PWA installation state, capturing the beforeinstallprompt event, detecting iOS devices, tracking install/dismiss status, and exposing a promptInstall function.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Core data hook that fetches Binance Futures market data, enriches it with advanced technical analysis and learning-engine signals, and exposes it via React Query with type definitions for market data structures.
frontend/src/hooks/useServiceWorkerUpdat: React hook that detects when a new service worker is waiting and exposes an `updateAndReload` function that sends SKIP_WAITING to trigger the update.
frontend/src/hooks/useTradeRecommendatio: React hook that derives a trade recommendation for a given symbol and modality by looking up the asset in market data and calling `computeTradeRecommendation`.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for a dark base theme plus two named themes (dark-neon and cyber-glow) with neon color palettes and background gradients.
frontend/src/lib/aiPaperTradingEngine.ts: Autonomous paper-trading engine that polls Binance futures tickers every 8 seconds, selects symbols per modality using scoring logic, opens/updates/closes simulated trades with TP/SL levels, and persists state via IndexedDB.
frontend/src/lib/fallbackSymbols.ts: Exports a hardcoded list of 100 USD-M perpetual futures symbols used as a fallback when the Binance API is unavailable.
frontend/src/lib/learningEngine.ts: IndexedDB-backed learning engine that stores prediction records and per-asset accuracy stats, and adaptively adjusts indicator weights (SMC, volume delta, liquidity, FVG) based on prediction outcomes.
frontend/src/lib/paperTradeStorage.ts: IndexedDB persistence layer for AI paper trades, providing functions to open the DB, add/update open trades, archive closed trades, and define TypeScript interfaces for trade and history data.
frontend/src/lib/resetFromScratch.ts: Orchestrates a full app reset by clearing IndexedDB, localStorage, CacheStorage, and unregistering service workers, with helpers to check reset success and reload the app.
frontend/src/lib/stopLossCalculation.ts: Empty file, likely a stub or placeholder for stop-loss calculation logic that has been removed.
frontend/src/lib/takeProfitCalculation.t: Empty file, likely a stub or placeholder for take-profit calculation logic that has been removed.
frontend/src/lib/tradeRecommendation.ts: Computes trade recommendations (direction, entry, stop-loss, take-profit, rationale) from Binance market data using modality-specific risk/reward parameters such as scalping, swing, breakout, and SMC.
frontend/src/lib/tradeStorage.ts: Empty file, likely a stub or placeholder for trade storage logic that has been removed.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color tokens (neon, sidebar, chart), border radii, box shadows, and enabling typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking the app's architecture, known issues, and completed features—primarily the removal of ICP, Radar, Order Book, and Trade Monitor tabs to reduce bundle size for ICP canister deployment.
